title: Flat Biomes
description: Adds biomes to vanilla flat world type
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69e108eebda38386da3a8a43fa6fd8f4b57a770e.jpeg)
This mod adds a way to enable biomes on vanilla flat worlds, which means you get to have biomes while also modifying the built in layer preset of vanilla minecraft.

There are 3 biome presets, type the one you want here:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c5183c1957af7a8284f66d5deadbd8b9903a132.png)
(World -> Customize -> Presets)

The presets are:
- flatbiomes:overworld
- flatbiomes:nether
- flatbiomes:end
